label: Cloud Analytics Vendor (2024)
summary: Vendor accepted Ontario-only residency and OSFI-aligned breach reporting; Initech in turn agreed to a Net-45 payment compromise and conceded language about feedback ownership. Custom-developed modules transferred to Initech upon payment.

clauses.text: Any custom features, configurations, or modules developed specifically for Client and funded by Client shall be owned solely by Client upon full payment of the applicable fees therefor. Vendor is granted a non-exclusive, royalty-free licence to use Custom Developments solely to provide Services to Client.
Invoices are due within forty-five (45) days of the invoice date. Overdue amounts bear interest at the rate of 0.75% per month.

Vendor may use Client feedback solely to improve the Services provided to Client. Vendor shall not use Client feedback to develop features or improvements made available to other clients without Client's prior written consent.

Vendor shall notify Client within twenty-four (24) hours of becoming aware of any unauthorized access to Client Data and shall provide a written incident report within five (5) business days, including a root cause analysis aligned with OSFI third-party risk reporting expectations.

Client may audit Vendor's information security practices and systems no more than twice per calendar year upon forty-eight (48) hours' prior written notice. Vendor shall maintain ISO 27001 or SOC 2 Type II certification and provide evidence annually.
